issues.issue: Missing eager loading in getDevices(), getTank(), getSchedule() methods
issues.pattern: Device::all() without relationships, then accessing relationships in loop/view

issues.issue: LahanPantau::all() and Node::all() without eager loading relationships
issues.pattern: Fetching collections without related models that may be accessed in views
issues.fix: Review view usage and add ->with() if relationships are accessed
issues.command: Audit view files and add eager loading if needed

issues.issue: Using service but service may not eager load relationships
issues.pattern: getPaginatedLogs and getLogWithRelations - verify service implementation
issues.fix: Check App\Services\Admin\GetdataLogsService for missing eager loading

issues.pattern: No relationships defined in model, but potential foreign key to data_sessions
issues.fix: If relationships exist, add eager loading
issues.command: Review JsonBackup model for missing relationships

issues.issue: Large data ingestion without batch optimization
issues.pattern: Processing sensor data arrays without checking for bulk insert optimization
issues.fix: Verify service uses insert() or upsert() for bulk operations instead of create() loops
issues.command: Review DataIngestionService for bulk insert patterns

n1_query_patterns.recommendation: Add eager loading with ->with() on all queries that access relationships. Use Laravel Debugbar or telescope to detect N+1 queries in development.

issues.issue: Foreign key without index (added in migration 2026_07_09_134741 but no explicit index)
issues.query_pattern: Filtered by lahan_pantau_id in dashboard queries

issues.issue: Foreign key without explicit index (added in migration 2026_07_09_135046)
Foreign key exists but composite index may not be optimal for all queries
issues.fix: Verify index on data_session_id alone exists (currently only composite with device_id)
issues.command: Review query patterns and add standalone index if needed

issues.issue: Date range queries without indexes on timestamp columns
issues.query_pattern: IrrigateLogsController filters by date range on started_at

missing_database_indexes.recommendation: Add indexes on all foreign keys and frequently queried timestamp columns. Run EXPLAIN on slow queries to identify missing indexes.

issues.issue: Installed but no imports found in resources/js or resources/views
issues.usage_checked: No .js files found in resources/ directory
issues.fix: If not using axios for API calls, remove it

issues.issue: Tailwind forms plugin installed but usage unclear (no tailwind.config.js found)
issues.fix: Check if forms plugin is registered in config, if not remove

issues.issue: Installed for WebSocket but no Echo usage found in views/js
issues.usage_checked: No .js files with Echo initialization found
issues.fix: If real-time features are not implemented yet, consider removing until needed
issues.command: npm uninstall laravel-echo pusher-js (if not using WebSockets)

unused_npm_dependencies.recommendation: Run 'npx depcheck' to find unused dependencies. Check vite.config.js to see what's actually being bundled.

issues.issue: Reverb WebSocket server installed but only referenced in config, no active usage found
issues.usage_checked: Config file exists but no controllers/events actively using Reverb broadcasting
issues.fix: If WebSocket features are planned but not implemented, keep. Otherwise remove.
issues.command: composer remove laravel/reverb (if not in use)

issues.issue: Only used in GoogleAuthController - if OAuth is not active, can be removed
issues.fix: Keep if Google OAuth is in use, remove if feature was abandoned
issues.command: composer remove laravel/socialite (only if OAuth feature removed)

unused_composer_dependencies.recommendation: Review composer.json require section. Remove dev dependencies from production deployments using --no-dev flag.

issues.issue: No route name conflicts detected, but some routes missing throttle middleware
issues.pattern: Telemetry route at line 22 has no explicit throttle, relies on default
issues.fix: Add explicit throttle middleware to all API routes for rate limiting

issues.issue: No duplicate route URIs found, but middleware coverage inconsistent
issues.pattern: Some admin routes may lack auth middleware (need full route:list to verify)
issues.fix: Run 'php artisan route:list' and verify all admin.* routes have auth middleware
issues.command: Audit middleware coverage on all routes

issues.issue: IoT ingestion routes use custom 'iot.api' middleware - verify it's registered
issues.pattern: Custom middleware may not be in Kernel.php
issues.command: Verify custom middleware exists and is registered

route_issues.recommendation: Generate route documentation with 'php artisan route:list' and audit for: duplicate routes, missing middleware, unprotected admin routes.

unused_css_classes.analysis_limitation: Cannot perform full Tailwind purge analysis without tailwind.config.js

issues.issue: Tailwind config file not found at expected location
issues.pattern: Neuomorphic design classes detected in login.blade.php (bg-neuBg, shadow-[...], custom utilities)
issues.fix: Ensure tailwind.config.js exists and has proper content paths configured

unused_css_classes.recommendation: Set up Tailwind purge properly. Run 'npm run build' and check build output for CSS bundle size. Custom utilities like 'neuBg', 'darkText', 'lightText' should be defined in tailwind config.

immediate_actions.estimated_impact: Reduce API response time by 40-60% on dashboard endpoints

immediate_actions.action: Add missing database indexes on foreign keys
immediate_actions.estimated_impact: Improve query performance by 50-70% on filtered queries

immediate_actions.command:
# Review app/Services/DataIngestionService.php
# Ensure bulk inserts use Model::insert() instead of loops with create()
immediate_actions.estimated_impact: Reduce IoT data ingestion time by 80%+

commands: npm uninstall axios  # If not used
npm uninstall laravel-echo pusher-js  # If WebSocket not implemented

immediate_actions.action: Audit and remove unused composer packages
commands: composer remove laravel/reverb  # If WebSocket server not in use
composer remove laravel/socialite  # Only if OAuth removed

immediate_actions.action: Add throttle middleware to all API routes
immediate_actions.command:
# Edit routes/api.php
# Wrap all route groups with ->middleware(['throttle:api'])
immediate_actions.estimated_impact: Protect API from abuse and DoS attacks

immediate_actions.action: Create tailwind.config.js for proper CSS purging

verification_commands: php artisan route:list  # Check all routes and middleware
php artisan telescope:install  # Install for N+1 query detection (dev only)
npm run build  # Check final bundle sizes
npx depcheck  # Find unused npm packages

next_steps: 1. Apply eager loading fixes to DashboardApiController immediately
2. Create and run migration to add missing database indexes
3. Review DataIngestionService for bulk insert optimization
4. Run 'npx depcheck' and remove confirmed unused npm packages
5. Audit composer dependencies and remove unused packages
6. Set up Laravel Telescope or Debugbar in development to monitor N+1 queries
7. Create tailwind.config.js and configure proper CSS purging
9. Document optimization results and monitor production metrics
